title: Computer Craft: ReCreated
description: Changes CC: Tweaked to match Create style
body:
# About
This resourcepack changes textures of [CC:Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) to match style of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).

Inspired by [Computer Craft: Create](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ccc)

The reason why this resourcepack was made is because [CCC](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ccc) didn't update in a while. Some new features of CC:Tweaked were broken or not implemented in the resourcepack. This resourcepack supports these new features, while upgrading them where it's possible.

# Images
See more in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/computer-craft-recreated/gallery)!

![Turtle Carrier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3KLJnXcN/images/2ad5cf6ded4998fcf2dfd6ba0e97bdf111463333.png)
![Turtle Upgrades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3KLJnXcN/images/23094e4c5bd8c9ed60522c704951fa4bdb4524cc.png)
![Pocket computers and colored turtle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3KLJnXcN/images/737dc86a2f99510ec13f17f52943e2556f96d0b1.png)

# Credits
Most assets of this resourcepack are derivatives of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) or [CC:Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) assets.
